# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Bash script for deploying to AWS using the AWS CLI. The script should authenticate with AWS and perform deployment operations. Ensure the script can be used safely in both local development and CI/CD environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

IFS=$'\n\t'
umask 077

log() {
  printf '[%s] %s\n' "$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" "$*" >&2
}

die() {
  log "ERROR: $*"
  exit 1
}

usage() {
  cat >&2 <<'EOF'
Usage:
  deploy.sh [--region REGION] [--profile PROFILE] [--stack-name STACK] [--template-file FILE] [--parameter-overrides KEY=VALUE ...] [--capabilities CAP1 CAP2 ...] [--no-execute-changeset] [--dry-run]

Environment:
  AWS_REGION / AWS_DEFAULT_REGION   Default AWS region
  AWS_PROFILE                       AWS CLI profile for local development
  DEPLOY_STACK_NAME                 CloudFormation stack name
  DEPLOY_TEMPLATE_FILE              CloudFormation template file
  DEPLOY_PARAMETER_OVERRIDES        Space-separated KEY=VALUE pairs
  DEPLOY_CAPABILITIES               Space-separated CloudFormation capabilities
  DEPLOY_NO_EXECUTE_CHANGESET       If "true", create changeset but do not execute
  DEPLOY_DRY_RUN                    If "true", validate and exit

Notes:
  - AWS credentials may be provided via environment variables, AWS profile, or CI role credentials.
  - The script validates AWS authentication before deploying.
EOF
}

command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || die "aws CLI is not installed"
command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || die "jq is not installed"

REGION="${AWS_REGION:-${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-}}"
PROFILE="${AWS_PROFILE:-}"
STACK_NAME="${DEPLOY_STACK_NAME:-}"
TEMPLATE_FILE="${DEPLOY_TEMPLATE_FILE:-template.yaml}"
PARAMETER_OVERRIDES=()
CAPABILITIES=()
NO_EXECUTE_CHANGESET="${DEPLOY_NO_EXECUTE_CHANGESET:-false}"
DRY_RUN="${DEPLOY_DRY_RUN:-false}"
CHANGESET_NAME="deploy-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)-$$"

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
  case "$1" in
    --region)
      [[ $# -ge 2 ]] || die "--region requires a value"
      REGION="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --profile)
      [[ $# -ge 2 ]] || die "--profile requires a value"
      PROFILE="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --stack-name)
      [[ $# -ge 2 ]] || die "--stack-name requires a value"
      STACK_NAME="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --template-file)
      [[ $# -ge 2 ]] || die "--template-file requires a value"
      TEMPLATE_FILE="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --parameter-overrides)
      shift
      while [[ $# -gt 0 && "$1" != --* ]]; do
        PARAMETER_OVERRIDES+=("$1")
        shift
      done
      ;;
    --capabilities)
      shift
      while [[ $# -gt 0 && "$1" != --* ]]; do
        CAPABILITIES+=("$1")
        shift
      done
      ;;
    --no-execute-changeset)
      NO_EXECUTE_CHANGESET="true"
      shift
      ;;
    --dry-run)
      DRY_RUN="true"
      shift
      ;;
    -h|--help)
      usage
      exit 0
      ;;
    *)
      die "Unknown argument: $1"
      ;;
  esac
done

[[ -n "$STACK_NAME" ]] || die "Stack name is required. Set DEPLOY_STACK_NAME or pass --stack-name."
[[ -f "$TEMPLATE_FILE" ]] || die "Template file not found: $TEMPLATE_FILE"
[[ -n "$REGION" ]] || die "AWS region is required. Set AWS_REGION/AWS_DEFAULT_REGION or pass --region."

AWS_ARGS=(--region "$REGION")
if [[ -n "$PROFILE" ]]; then
  AWS_ARGS+=(--profile "$PROFILE")
fi

if ! aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" sts get-caller-identity >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  die "AWS authentication failed. Configure credentials for local development or CI/CD."
fi

log "Authenticated to AWS in region: $REGION"
log "Deploying stack: $STACK_NAME"
log "Using template: $TEMPLATE_FILE"

if [[ -n "${CI:-}" || "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" == "true" || "${GITLAB_CI:-}" == "true" || "${JENKINS_URL:-}" ]]; then
  log "Running in CI/CD environment"
else
  log "Running in local development environment"
fi

if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
  log "Dry run enabled: validating template only"
  aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" cloudformation validate-template --template-body "file://$TEMPLATE_FILE" >/dev/null
  log "Template validation succeeded"
  exit 0
fi

CREATE_CHANGESET_ARGS=(
  cloudformation create-change-set
  --stack-name "$STACK_NAME"
  --change-set-name "$CHANGESET_NAME"
  --change-set-type UPDATE
  --template-body "file://$TEMPLATE_FILE"
  --capabilities
)

if [[ ${#CAPABILITIES[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
  CAPABILITIES=(CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM)
fi
CREATE_CHANGESET_ARGS+=("${CAPABILITIES[@]}")

if [[ ${#PARAMETER_OVERRIDES[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
  CREATE_CHANGESET_ARGS+=(--parameter-overrides "${PARAMETER_OVERRIDES[@]}")
fi

set +e
CHANGESET_OUTPUT=$(aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" "${CREATE_CHANGESET_ARGS[@]}" 2>&1)
CREATE_RC=$?
set -e

if [[ $CREATE_RC -ne 0 ]]; then
  if grep -qiE 'does not exist|cannot be found|ValidationError' <<<"$CHANGESET_OUTPUT"; then
    log "Stack does not exist or update change set failed; attempting create operation"
    CREATE_ARGS=(
      cloudformation create-change-set
      --stack-name "$STACK_NAME"
      --change-set-name "$CHANGESET_NAME"
      --change-set-type CREATE
      --template-body "file://$TEMPLATE_FILE"
      --capabilities
    )
    CREATE_ARGS+=("${CAPABILITIES[@]}")
    if [[ ${#PARAMETER_OVERRIDES[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
      CREATE_ARGS+=(--parameter-overrides "${PARAMETER_OVERRIDES[@]}")
    fi
    aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" "${CREATE_ARGS[@]}" >/dev/null
  else
    log "$CHANGESET_OUTPUT"
    die "Failed to create change set"
  fi
else
  log "Change set created: $CHANGESET_NAME"
fi

log "Waiting for change set to be ready"
if ! aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" cloudformation wait change-set-create-complete --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" --change-set-name "$CHANGESET_NAME" 2>/dev/null; then
  STATUS_JSON=$(aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" cloudformation describe-change-set --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" --change-set-name "$CHANGESET_NAME" | jq -r '.Status, .StatusReason' || true)
  log "Change set status:"
  log "$STATUS_JSON"
  if grep -qi 'didn't contain changes' <<<"$STATUS_JSON"; then
    log "No changes detected; skipping execution"
    exit 0
  fi
  die "Change set did not become ready"
fi

if [[ "$NO_EXECUTE_CHANGESET" == "true" ]]; then
  log "No-execute changeset enabled; deployment stopped after change set creation"
  exit 0
fi

log "Executing change set"
aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" cloudformation execute-change-set --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" --change-set-name "$CHANGESET_NAME" >/dev/null

log "Waiting for stack operation to complete"
if aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" cloudformation wait stack-update-complete --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" 2>/dev/null; then
  log "Stack update completed successfully"
else
  if aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" cloudformation wait stack-create-complete --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" 2>/dev/null; then
    log "Stack creation completed successfully"
  else
    die "Stack deployment failed"
  fi
fi

log "Deployment finished successfully"
